name: Dundee Precious Metals Inc.
description: Dundee Precious Metals Inc. is a Canadian-based, international gold mining company with operations and projects located in Bulgaria, Namibia, Serbia, and Ecuador. The company's core assets include the Chelopech mine, which produces a gold-copper concentrate, and the Ada Tepe mine, which produces a gold-silver concentrate, both located in Bulgaria. Dundee Precious Metals is committed to responsible mining practices, focusing on operational excellence, environmental stewardship, and social responsibility while delivering value to its shareholders through the exploration and development of precious metal properties.
